attributes.notes:
# Arrival Day in Paris

## Transportation
- RER B from CDG to Châtelet (approx 45 mins, €10.30)
- Consider buying weekly Navigo pass

## Accommodation
- Hotel check-in after 3 PM
- Store luggage if arriving early

## Important Notes
- Download offline maps before arrival
- Exchange some cash for small purchases
- Jet lag management - stay awake until evening
attributes.eveningActivities: Dinner at traditional bistro in Latin Quarter, evening stroll along Seine River
attributes.morningActivities: Arrive at CDG Airport, take RER B to central Paris, check into hotel near Louvre
attributes.afternoonActivities: Walking tour of Île de la Cité, visit Notre-Dame area, explore Sainte-Chapelle
